description: Style NoteGet the apple of your eye up and about in a pair of denim shorts from doodle that plays as hard as she does. Team this with a white tee and casual footwear for heightened style. The soft cotton fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Product DetailsWashed blue denim shorts, has two insert pockets on the front with one coin pocket, two patch pockets on the back, elasticated waistband with inner buttons to adjust Fit, belt loops, metal zipper and button closure on the front and decorative patch on frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergentDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakWash and dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only
